label: SES-143 / CNV-045 close-out — WTK-004 Workstream + Work Task UI monitoring panels. Read-only desktop panels (ui/panels/workstreams.py + work_tasks.py) under the Governance sidebar group, mirroring existing entity panels; surfaces phase_type/status/needs_attention (Workstream) and area/status/claimed_by (Work Task). Built by a parallel Claude Code session in an isolated worktree (no decision — straightforward mirror of existing panels). WTK-004 (under WSK-001) driven to Complete; ADDRESSES (not resolves) PI-114 under PRJ-018. Code on main as commit 6014e33. (Built in parallel with WTK-005 PI Lead / SES-142.)

session.session_title: Build the Workstream + Work Task UI monitoring panels (WTK-004)
session.session_executive_summary: Parallel Claude Code execution session (a second session in an isolated git worktree) building WTK-004, the Workstream + Work Task UI monitoring panels — the fourth Work Task of PI-114's Development phase (WSK-001), concurrent with the WTK-005 PI Lead substrate (SES-142). Adds read-only desktop panels ui/panels/workstreams.py and ui/panels/work_tasks.py under the Governance sidebar group, mirroring existing entity panels: the Workstream panel surfaces phase_type, status, and needs_attention; the Work Task panel surfaces area, status, and claimed_by. Sidebar + client wiring; UI tests. Built in an isolated worktree, cherry-picked onto main. Full v2 suite green. WTK-004 Complete; addresses (not resolves) PI-114. Closes the WSK-/WTK- UI-visibility gap.
session.session_description: Parallel execution session, launched as a second Claude Code session in an isolated git worktree so it could run concurrently with the primary session (WTK-005 PI Lead) without git conflicts — the dogfood of parallel sessions Doug asked for. It owned only ui/; the primary owned access/api/. WTK-004 was created via direct POST /work-tasks under WSK-001 and driven Planned -> Ready -> Claimed -> In Progress -> Complete. The build closed the visibility gap surfaced earlier this engagement: the new PI-112 Workstream (WSK-) and Work Task (WTK-) entities had no desktop monitoring panel, so the ADO hierarchy (PRJ-018 -> PI-114 -> WSK-001 -> WTK-001..005) was invisible in the app despite being correctly wired in the DB. Added ui/panels/workstreams.py (WorkstreamsPanel, a ListDetailPanel) and ui/panels/work_tasks.py (WorkTasksPanel), both read-only (the v2 desktop UI is monitoring-only; creation goes through the API), registered under the Governance sidebar group via sidebar.py, with the API client (ui/client.py) and main_window.py wiring. The Workstream panel surfaces phase_type, status, and the trust-critical needs_attention flag; the Work Task panel surfaces area, status, and claimed_by. Added UI tests (test_workstreams_panel.py, test_work_tasks_panel.py) mirroring the existing panel-test pattern, plus a smoke-test update. Full v2 suite green. The work was committed on the worktree branch and cherry-picked onto main (commit 6014e33); no file overlap with the primary session's access/api changes. Governance for this Work Task is authored here by the orchestrating session on main (the worktree did no governance, avoiding identifier collisions). Addresses PI-114 without resolving it.

conversation.conversation_description: Built read-only ui/panels/workstreams.py and ui/panels/work_tasks.py under the Governance sidebar group, mirroring the existing entity panels; surfaced phase_type/status/needs_attention (Workstream) and area/status/claimed_by (Work Task); wired the sidebar, API client, and main_window. Added UI tests. Ran as a second session in an isolated worktree (disjoint from the PI Lead session's access/api work) and cherry-picked onto main. Full v2 suite green. Drove WTK-004 (under WSK-001) to Complete. Addresses (not resolves) PI-114.
conversation.conversation_summary: Workstream + Work Task UI monitoring panels delivered under the Governance sidebar (read-only, mirroring existing panels), closing the WSK-/WTK- visibility gap. Built by a parallel worktree session, cherry-picked onto main. WTK-004 Complete; PI-114 addressed.

commits.commit_message_first_line: v2: WTK-004 — Workstream + Work Task UI monitoring panels
commits.commit_message_full:
v2: WTK-004 — Workstream + Work Task UI monitoring panels

Read-only desktop monitoring panels for the Workstream (WSK-) and Work
Task (WTK-) entities under the Governance sidebar group, mirroring the
existing entity panels. Surfaces phase_type/status/needs_attention for
Workstreams and area/status/claimed_by for Work Tasks, plus related-edge
context. Sidebar + client wiring; UI tests.

Built by a parallel Claude Code session in an isolated worktree.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
